highRiskItems.reason: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Source states turn on hazard + position lights only. Top candidate q0291 adds rear lights (hazard+position+rear). Candidate set conflicts with localized statement (omits rear lights); cannot safely approve or map.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Dashboard icon appears to show an open right door (visual evidence). Candidate qids in top matches disagree (some indicate left door, both doors, trunk, etc.) and top match labels disagree on correct row. Conflicting candidates — cannot safely map.

rejectedTopMatcherExamples.reason: Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Triangular warning with gate/fence pictogram indicates a manned/guarded level crossing. q0897 corresponds to 'a manned railway crossing' — localized option B = 'passage à niveau sous surveillance'.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt asks if signal allows turning into oncoming lane before oncoming vehicle. Candidate q0638 asks similar and has correctRow = Wrong => localized answer 'No' (B). Visual and candidate align sufficiently though some ambiguity remains.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Candidate q0358 explicitly states parking on the sidewalk when no parking found is not allowed (Wrong). Source options map 'No' to B — select B. Top-ranked candidate (q0307) was about 50m rule and not as close, so chosen q0358 instead. Rejected top matcher: Top-ranked candidate (q0307) concerned stopping near intersections (50m) which is less semantically close than q0358 about borrowing the sidewalk.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Candidate q0593 defines 'What is an airbag?' as an occupant-protection system. Source option D ('protect the driver and passengers') carries same meaning; approve. Note: top-ranked candidate was about seat belt (different), so selected q0593 (rank 2). Rejected top matcher: Top-ranked candidate (q0626) referred to seat belt role, not airbag; q0593 is the correct semantic match.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Master q0495 states a driver who flees after causing a (non‑criminal) traffic accident gets a 12‑point penalty. Source option A = '12' so select A. Top candidate differed (q0981) but q0495 is semantically correct. Rejected top matcher: Top-ranked candidate (q0981) concerned forged license; q0495 is the correct match for fleeing-after-accident penalty points.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: No candidate in shortlist exactly addresses 'hitting monuments or public installations' obligation to stop/report; source correct answer is 'No' (B). Create new localized question as no clear existing qid matches. Rejected top matcher: Top candidates were not about responsibility after hitting public installations; none matched semantics closely enough to reuse.

items.sourcePrompt: Sur le tableau a bord, quelle est la signfication quand s'allume?

items.sourcePrompt: Dans cette situation, le conducteur peut doubler en accélérant.

Candidates show conflicting/poor matches; create new to avoid mismapping.
